info.title: iLab API Documentation
info.description: Versioned REST API documentation for the iLab React Web SPA and Android/iOS mobile applications.

post.description: Email is required and phone is optional. Manual registration creates an unverified account and sends an email verification code.

409.description: Account exists but email verification is pending

post.description: User can login with phone or email. Manual student accounts must verify email before token is issued.

403.description: Email verification required or unauthorized portal access

post.description: Google users can login without phone verification, but profile remains incomplete until phone is added and verified.

post.summary: Logout user and revoke current token

get.description: Returns real certificates for the authenticated student. Eligible certificates are created automatically when course progress reaches 90%.
Returns a paginated list of published courses for the storefront.

get.summary: Get full course details by slug
get.description: Returns course details including section and lesson hierarchy. Paid video URLs are hidden from guests.
Returns published events with registration counts and finished status.
Returns a single published event by slug.

post.description: Creates an event registration. Finished events cannot receive registrations.

why_want_to_learn.example: I want to build a mobile repairing business.

get.description: Returns sections and lessons for enrolled students. Direct video URLs are not exposed.

post.description: Marks a lesson complete only if the student is enrolled and has watched enough of the lesson.

403.description: Not enrolled or watch threshold not met

put.description: Frontend video player should call this every 10-15 seconds to save resume point.

get.description: Returns published categories for course or blog content.
Returns published student/customer reviews with pagination.
Returns public home page settings, system contact data, and social media links.

post.description: Verifies a manual registration email OTP and returns a student Bearer token.

200.description: Password reset code sent when account exists

403.description: Only student accounts can access this endpoint

get.description: Returns the latest questions asked by the authenticated student with answers and lesson/course details.

post.description: Checks whether a coupon is usable for a course and returns the calculated final amount.

422.description: Invalid, expired, fully used coupon, or validation error

post.description: Payment gateway callback endpoint. This is called by UddoktaPay, not by the client app.

get.description: Payment gateway success redirect. Verifies payment and redirects the user to the frontend.

302.description: Redirects to frontend success or pending page

get.description: Payment gateway cancel redirect. Marks pending payment failed when possible and redirects to frontend.
Returns enrolled courses, modules, lessons, and active Google Drive/resource URLs only when resources exist.
Returns secure lesson player data for enrolled students, including YouTube embed URL, watermark identity, notes, resources, progress, and Q&A.

question.example: Can you explain this topic again?

post.description: Staff/instructor answer endpoint. Student apps normally read answers from the player or Q&A endpoints.

403.description: Only instructors or admins can answer

post.description: Calculates the final price securely. Free courses enroll instantly; paid courses return a payment URL.

200.description: Checkout initialized or free enrollment completed

409.description: Already enrolled or suspended from this course

503.description: Payment gateway is not configured or disabled

get.description: Check if the backend API server is running.

sanctum.description: Laravel Sanctum Bearer Token. Example: Bearer {access_token}

tags.description: Endpoints for registration, login, Google login, logout, and device tracking

tags.description: Public blog post listing and details

tags.description: Public event listing, event details, and event registration endpoints

tags.description: Endpoints for requesting OTPs and resetting user passwords

tags.name: Public Catalog
tags.description: Public website data used by the web app and mobile apps

tags.name: Student Profile
tags.description: Endpoints for student dashboard and profile management

tags.name: Student Q&A
tags.description: Authenticated student course question and answer endpoints

tags.description: System health and API status endpoints
